story.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
story.summary: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

points.heading: Slow-cial Messaging App
points.detail: Roost is a "slow-cial" app where messages take hours or days to send, depending on the chosen bird's real-life travel speed.

points.heading: Addresses Demand for Slowdown
points.detail: People crave the opportunity to slow down and disconnect from apps that constantly demand attention, embracing technology that adds friction.

points.heading: Rapid User Growth
points.detail: The app grew from 10,000 to 100,000 users in three days and is now about to hit 300,000 users.

points.heading: AI Art Controversy
points.detail: The app faced user complaints for using AI-generated art, leading its creator to run a contest for artists to contribute new art.
